---
name: Feature Request 💡
about: Suggest a new feature, player control, or architectural enhancement.
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

<!-- 
Before submitting a feature request, please search existing issues to see if the feature has already been proposed.
-->

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

*A clear and concise description of what the problem or limitation is. (e.g., "I cannot step back one video frame at a time; I can only seek forward and backward in larger steps").*

---

## Proposed Solution

*A detailed description of the feature or capability you want to add. Explain how it should behave from a user or developer perspective.*

---

## Technical Considerations (Optional)

*If you have architectural implementation suggestions, outline them here (e.g. key bindings in PlayerUI.cpp, new player controller states, FFmpeg flag configurations).*

---

## User Value / Benefits

*Who benefits from this feature? Why is it a valuable addition to NaikAVPlayer (e.g., improves UX, helps media validation, reduces API complexity)?*

---

## Alternatives Considered

*A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered, and why they were not chosen.*

---

## Additional Context (Optional)

*Add any other context, mockup screenshots, or reference designs from other players (e.g. VLC, mpv, MPC-HC) here.*
